title: Domain Separation Test Vectors - Authentication
description: RFC 6979 deterministic ECDSA signatures with SIGIL-AUTH-V1 domain tag
signature_format: Fixed 64-byte (r || s), low-S normalized per BIP-62

vectors.name: Authentication challenge signature
vectors.description: Server signs random 32-byte challenge with auth domain tag
vectors.verification: Device verifies server signature using same tag + challenge_bytes

vectors.name: Authentication response signature
vectors.description: Device signs same challenge bytes with auth domain tag
vectors.verification: Server verifies device signature using same tag + challenge_bytes

invalid_cases.name: Wrong domain tag (MPA tag used for auth)
invalid_cases.reason: Signature produced with SIGIL-MPA-V1 will not verify against SIGIL-AUTH-V1

invalid_cases.name: No domain tag (raw message)
invalid_cases.reason: Signature without domain tag will not verify with domain tag
